title: It Started With a Spark (and a Resignation Letter)
content: In 2018, the corporate world burned us out. We were tired of 'circling back,' 'touching base,' and 'per my last email.' So, we had an idea. We quit. We channeled that burnout into our debut album, Spark, a record about finding the fire in our hearts again.

title: Anti-Burnout
content: We believe rest is productive. Our music explores the messy reality of modern life, anxiety, and the joy of doing absolutely nothing.

title: Pro-Crow
content: We respect our avian neighbors. A portion of our energy goes into birdwatching (and some proceeds go to animal charities like SOS Animal Portugal).

title: Quality Over Quantity
content: We don't drop-ship junk. We print on museum-quality paper, use 180g vinyl, and our apparel is designed to survive a mosh pit or a nap.

title: We Love the Planet (It's Where We Keep Our Stuff)
content: We hate crushed corners. That's why all our vinyls ship in heavy-duty mailers with corrugated stiffeners. If it can be recycled, it is.

title: The 'Shake Test'
content: To prevent damage and waste, we physically shake every CD case before shipping. If it rattles, we fix it with a foam stopper. Less returns = less carbon footprint.

title: Everyone is Welcome (Except the Corporate Overlords)
content: Whether you're a 'Super Powered Paracetamol' user, a bird watcher, or someone just trying to survive the week, you belong here. We are committed to a safe, inclusive community where mental health is discussed openly, and 'weird' is a compliment.
